positive: A cyberpunk street market scene in the rain. Glowing holographic advertisements, dense wiring, noodle stalls, and futuristic characters wearing reflective gear. Moody cinematic lighting, high contrast, deep shadows, dieselpunk aesthetic, highly detailed digital illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, soft lighting, watercolor, pastoral, clean lines
